title: gesneria pumila subsp. neglecta
intro: Gesneria pumila subsp. neglecta, also known as the small gesneria or miniature gesneria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gesneria pumila subsp. neglecta include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used externally as a poultice or salve to promote healing and soothe skin irritations.
